pi_items.source: Code analysis of export_result.sh and verifier.py
Task description labels as '(e.g., age: 35...)' and verifier.py uses metadata value

privileged_info_summary: No verified privileged information available. The task involves submitting a survey response to a 'Customer Satisfaction Survey' in LimeSurvey. The metadata claims specify expected_response_field='age' and expected_response_value='35', but these cannot be independently verified because: (1) the survey is dynamically created by an agent through the LimeSurvey UI, not pre-built from a known data source; (2) the export_result.sh script extracts the last column from the response table without validating it is an 'age' field; (3) the value '35' is presented as a sample example in the task description, not confirmed as the actual expected value from survey specifications.
